name: High Explosive Grenade
remarks: Standard damage type, effective against lightly armoured troops.

name: Armour Piercing Grenade
remarks: High damage type, small blast area, but better at taking out PA/AD troops.

name: Anti-Vehicular Grenade
remarks: Power damage type against vehicles, low damage for any figures in blast area. Only -1 penalty against PS shields (not the normal -3).

name: Frag Hyper-Hit Grenade
remarks: High damage type, large blast area. Effective against lightly armoured troops.

name: Smoke Grenade
remarks: Blocking only — see concealment rules. Creates a smoke cloud blocking line of sight.

name: Limpet Grenade
remarks: Self-tracking once thrown/fired. Houses a shaped charge. +2 to hit bonus. Power damage to armour type. Affects 1 figure only.

name: Stun Grenade
remarks: Stun damage type only. No kills.

name: EMP Grenade
remarks: Electro-magnetic pulse. Effective against robots, androids, and powered armour. Causes STUN results against PA/AD troops.

name: Incendiary Grenade
remarks: Fire/incendiary damage. Causes suppression. Counts as a beam/flame weapon for suppression modifier purposes.

name: Poison Grenade
remarks: Fires poison needles. Uses the Poison Fire chart for damage resolution.

name: Anti-Personnel Missile
remarks: Large blast area anti-personnel shell. Standard damage type. Causes suppression.

name: Anti-Tank Missile
remarks: Tank busting high penetration round. Total damage type against vehicles. Standard damage for any figures in blast area. Only -1 penalty against PS shields (not -3).

name: Guided Missile (ML)
remarks: Fired from Missile Launcher (ML). May be either AT or AP type missile. Uses basic guidance system.
